retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional once the condition (cd exists and is global) is satisfied; retrying would lead to double-put or no-op since the flag is cleared.
contract_summary: This function is a batch put wrapper that releases the reference held by each thread's global perf_ctx_data. It iterates over all process threads under an RCU read lock, clears the global flag, and calls detach_task_ctx_data (which decrements the refcount). After this function, all references to global context data are released; callers must ensure no other concurrent access to these objects. The function is typically called during subsystem teardown/probe cleanup.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to iterate over all threads and release (put) references on perf_ctx_data that are marked global. The only non-refcount logic is clearing the global flag to prevent double release.
